notes: This is a multi-product EPD covering numerous Ready Mix concrete mixes across five batching plants: Dry Creek, Elizabeth, Mile End, McLaren Vale, and Osborne in South Australia.
The primary/first mix selected for A1-A3 GWP data is N2020P Ref (20 MPa reference mix) at the Dry Creek batching plant, with GWPt = 275 kg CO2-eq per m3 (page 11, Table 13).

Other mixes declared in this EPD include: N2020P (F30, S30, S50), N2520P (Ref, F30, S30, T50, S50), N3220P (Ref, F30, S30, T50, S50), N4020P (Ref, F30, S30, T50, S50), N5020P (Ref, F30, S30, T50, S50), and many special class mixes (S1020, S1520, S2520, S3220, S4020, S5010, S5020, S6510, S6520, S8010, CLSM, NOFINES) across multiple plants.
Modules C1-C4 and D results are based on a representative mix N3220P S50 with density 2332 kg/m3. For other densities, results can be scaled linearly by mass.
Modules A4, A5, and B1-B7 are not declared (ND) as these are best considered at the building or structure level.
Compressive strength ranges from 10 MPa to 80 MPa across all mixes. The first/primary product declared is 20 MPa.
The manufacturing location shown is the Dry Creek plant (head office location). Other plants include Elizabeth, Mile End, McLaren Vale, and Osborne, all in South Australia.
Valid from date is 2023-07-31 (original EPD version 001); current version 003 published 2026-05-04 with validity until 2028-07-31.
GWPluluc value for C2 module is 6.39E-05 (0.0000639) kg CO2-eq per the results table on page 35.
